rules.immunity_elixirs: Elixir of X Immunity uses Root + Flower + Mineral / Salt / Ash. A required fourth-slot counteragent sets X and can set a minimum finished brew rarity.
rules.core_family_riders: Selected core ingredients can carry free thematic condition riders. These riders activate only in Poison and Bomb formulas unless a formula explicitly says otherwise.
rules.rare_die_steps: A small number of Rare core ingredients spend their full attribute budget on Die step +1.

brews.name: Antitoxin
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: purifying enhancer, holy component, or antivenom monster part.
brews.effect: The drinker has Advantage on saving throws against poison.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Ironroot Salve
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: defensive enhancer, earth essence, or reinforcing monster component.
brews.effect: The target gains a defensive buffer or improved resistance to forced movement by DM ruling.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Night-Eye Drops
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: shadow, moon, or sensory essence.
brews.effect: The user gains darkvision or improved low-light perception by DM ruling.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Oil of Etherealness
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: phase residue, ethereal essence, or another planar component.
brews.effect: One vial can cover one Medium or smaller creature and grants the effect of Etherealness.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Oil of Sharpness
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: concentrating enhancer or monster-derived cutting agent.
brews.effect: A coated slashing or piercing weapon or ammunition gains a temporary bonus to attack and damage rolls by DM ruling.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Philter of Love
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: fey, psychic, or glamour essence.
brews.effect: The drinker is charmed by the first creature they see shortly after drinking, by DM ruling.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Animal Friendship
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: fey essence or beast-derived component.
brews.effect: The drinker can cast Animal Friendship, with the save DC set by the potion or DM.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Clairvoyance
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: psychic, crystal, or remote-sensing essence.
brews.effect: The drinker gains the effect of Clairvoyance.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Climbing
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: spider, gecko, earth, or mobility component.
brews.effect: The drinker gains a climbing speed equal to walking speed and Advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks made to climb.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Comprehension
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: psychic, linguistic, or scribe-aligned essence.
brews.effect: The drinker understands the literal meaning of spoken and written languages they perceive.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Diminution
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: transmutation enhancer or size-altering essence.
brews.effect: The drinker is affected as if by the reduce effect of Enlarge/Reduce.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Dragon's Majesty
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: dragon gland, blood, scale essence, or another draconic component.
brews.effect: The drinker transforms or gains draconic majesty by DM ruling, often including flight, breath, or imposing presence.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Fire Breath
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: fire essence or dragon gland.
brews.effect: The drinker can exhale fire up to three times; creatures in the area make a Dexterity save or take fire damage.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Flying
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: air essence, wing membrane, or flight enhancer.
brews.effect: The drinker gains a flying speed equal to walking speed and can hover by DM ruling.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Gaseous Form
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: air, mist, or phase essence.
brews.effect: The drinker gains the effect of Gaseous Form.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Giant Size
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: giant blood, giant marrow, or mythic growth catalyst.
brews.effect: The drinker becomes Huge, gains increased reach, and deals extra weapon damage by DM ruling.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Growth
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: giant blood or transmutation enhancer.
brews.effect: The drinker is affected as if by the enlarge effect of Enlarge/Reduce.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Healing
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: holy/vital component, distillation agent, or restorative monster component.
brews.effect: The drinker regains 2d4 + 2 HP. Ingredient bonuses scale the dice and attached flat modifier.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Heroism
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: holy/vital component or courage-aligned essence.
brews.effect: The drinker gains temporary HP and is affected as if by Bless, by DM ruling.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Invisibility
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: shadow, phase, or light-bending essence.
brews.effect: The drinker becomes invisible until they attack, cast a spell, or the duration ends.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Invulnerability
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: holy, force, diamond, or mythic warding component.
brews.effect: The drinker gains resistance to all damage.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Mind Reading
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: psychic essence or telepathic monster component.
brews.effect: The drinker gains the effect of Detect Thoughts.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Regeneration
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: holy/vital component, troll blood, or regeneration enhancer.
brews.effect: At the start of each of the drinker's turns, the drinker regains 1d4 HP for the duration.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Resistance
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: essence or monster component that determines the damage type.
brews.effect: The drinker gains resistance to one damage type determined by the chosen fourth-slot component.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.notes: Legacy generic resistance formula; Potion of X Resistance is the preferred dynamic entry.

brews.name: Potion of Speed
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: haste enhancer, lightning essence, or quickening monster component.
brews.effect: The drinker gains the effect of Haste.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Storm Giant Strength
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: storm giant blood, storm essence, or giant-derived component.
brews.effect: The drinker's Strength becomes 29 unless their Strength is already equal or higher.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Watchful Rest
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: dream, moon, or vigilance essence.
brews.effect: The drinker remains alert during rest and can avoid the worst effects of magical sleep by DM ruling.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of Water Breathing
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: aquatic essence, gill, mucus, or water-aligned monster component.
brews.effect: The drinker can breathe underwater.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Potion of X Resistance
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: essence or monster component that sets X.
brews.effect: The drinker gains resistance to the damage type set by the fourth-slot component.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Quickstep Tonic
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: quickening enhancer or lightning/air essence.
brews.effect: The drinker gains a short burst of speed; suggested effect is +10 ft. speed and Advantage on initiative checks.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Basic Poison
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: monster venom, elemental essence, or poison enhancer.
brews.effect: A creature hit by the coated weapon or ammunition must make a Constitution save or take poison damage, per DM ruling.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Mindfog Poison
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: Mindshard Distillate, Aboleth Mucus, or another psychic component.
brews.effect: The target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is Confused for 1 minute and repeats the save at the end of each turn.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.notes: Confused is a campaign condition rider defined by the formula text.

brews.name: Paralytic Venom
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: Ghoul Ichor or another paralytic component.
brews.effect: The target makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it is Paralyzed for 1 minute and repeats the save at the end of each turn.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.notes: Save DC bonuses strengthen the poison.

brews.name: Poison of Charisma Weakening
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: venom, bile, essence, or monster component that adds a rider or die step.
brews.effect: The target chooses Constitution or Charisma before rolling. On a failed save, Charisma is reduced by 1d6 temporarily.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the attacked ability.

brews.name: Poison of Constitution Weakening
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: venom, bile, essence, or monster component that adds a rider or die step.
brews.effect: The target chooses Constitution or Constitution before rolling. On a failed save, Constitution is reduced by 1d6 temporarily.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the attacked ability.

brews.name: Poison of Dexterity Weakening
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: venom, bile, essence, or monster component that adds a rider or die step.
brews.effect: The target chooses Constitution or Dexterity before rolling. On a failed save, Dexterity is reduced by 1d6 temporarily.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the attacked ability.

brews.name: Poison of Intelligence Weakening
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: venom, bile, essence, or monster component that adds a rider or die step.
brews.effect: The target chooses Constitution or Intelligence before rolling. On a failed save, Intelligence is reduced by 1d6 temporarily.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the attacked ability.

brews.name: Poison of Strength Weakening
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: venom, bile, essence, or monster component that adds a rider or die step.
brews.effect: The target chooses Constitution or Strength before rolling. On a failed save, Strength is reduced by 1d6 temporarily.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the attacked ability.

brews.name: Poison of Wisdom Weakening
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: venom, bile, essence, or monster component that adds a rider or die step.
brews.effect: The target chooses Constitution or Wisdom before rolling. On a failed save, Wisdom is reduced by 1d6 temporarily.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the attacked ability.

brews.name: Purple Worm Poison
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: Purple Worm venom or an equivalent legendary monster toxin.
brews.effect: A creature exposed to the poison makes a Constitution save or takes heavy poison damage.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Siren's Whisper Poison
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: Siren Gland Extract, fey essence, or another charm-bearing component.
brews.effect: The target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is Charmed for 1 minute. The effect ends early if the target is harmed by the charmer or the charmer's allies.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.notes: Save DC bonuses strengthen the poison.

brews.name: Stoneblood Toxin
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: Basilisk Bile, Medusa-derived essence, or another petrifying component.
brews.effect: The target makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it is Petrified for 1 minute and repeats the save at the end of each turn.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Arcshock Bomb
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: Shock Eel Cerebrum, Storm Essence, or another electrical nerve-agent component.
brews.duration: Until the end of the target's next turn
brews.effect: Creatures in the blast make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature is Stunned until the end of its next turn.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.rider_duration: Until the end of the target's next turn
brews.notes: The fourth-slot component directs the electrical rider.

brews.name: Binding Resin Bomb
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: Ettercap Resin Gland or another binding monster component.
brews.effect: A creature struck by the resin makes a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, it is Restrained for 1 minute. It can use an action to repeat the save or escape by DM ruling.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply

brews.name: Blinding Dust Bomb
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: Eyeless Moth Dust or another vision-disrupting component.
brews.effect: Creatures in the cloud make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature is Blinded for 1 minute and repeats the save at the end of each turn.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.notes: Area / Range bonuses enlarge the cloud.

brews.name: Noxious Spore Bomb
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: Carrion Spore Sac or another toxic spore component.
brews.effect: Creatures in the cloud make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature is Poisoned for 1 minute and repeats the save at the end of each turn.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.notes: Area / Range bonuses enlarge the cloud.

brews.name: Terror Spore Bomb
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: Dreadcap Spore Cluster, fear essence, or another terror-bearing component.
brews.effect: Creatures in the cloud make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature is Frightened for 1 minute and repeats the save at the end of each turn.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.notes: Area / Range bonuses enlarge the cloud.

brews.name: Elixir of Charisma
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: enhancer, holy/vital component, essence, or monster-derived ability twist.
brews.effect: Charisma increases by 1d4 for the duration.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the ability.

brews.name: Elixir of Constitution
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: enhancer, holy/vital component, essence, or monster-derived ability twist.
brews.effect: Constitution increases by 1d4 for the duration.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the ability.

brews.name: Elixir of Dexterity
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: enhancer, holy/vital component, essence, or monster-derived ability twist.
brews.effect: Dexterity increases by 1d4 for the duration.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the ability.

brews.name: Elixir of Intelligence
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: enhancer, holy/vital component, essence, or monster-derived ability twist.
brews.effect: Intelligence increases by 1d4 for the duration.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the ability.

brews.name: Elixir of Strength
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: enhancer, holy/vital component, essence, or monster-derived ability twist.
brews.effect: Strength increases by 1d4 for the duration.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the ability.

brews.name: Elixir of Wisdom
brews.modifier: Optional fourth slot: enhancer, holy/vital component, essence, or monster-derived ability twist.
brews.effect: Wisdom increases by 1d4 for the duration.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Named formula variant sets the ability.

brews.name: Elixir of X Immunity
brews.modifier: Required fourth slot: a condition counteragent that sets X and the minimum finished brew rarity.
brews.effect: Immediately ends the condition set by the chosen counteragent if it is already present, then grants immunity to that condition for 1 hour.
brews.use: Bonus Action to use or apply
brews.theme_source: Required fourth-slot counteragent sets the condition and minimum brew rarity.
brews.notes: Shared immunity formula. The condition counteragent does not add Quality Steps; it can raise the minimum finished rarity.

condition_counteragents.desc: A colorless distillate that flashes silver when held to the light. It smells of clean rain and crushed mint, and leaves the tongue cool and sharply focused.
A rose-gold syrup that beads instead of running. It smells of cedar, bitter orange, and warm wax, and leaves a steadying warmth behind the breastbone.
A violet tincture with tiny crystal motes that align when the vial is still. It smells of rosemary, old paper, and cold stone.
A bright amber powder that crackles softly between the fingers. It smells of sun-warmed grass, pepper, and iron, and tastes intensely hot without burning.
A pale blue serum that crawls up glass in branching lines. It smells of rain, copper, and sharp herbs, and tingles against the skin.
A pearlescent solvent that makes mineral dust hiss and loosen. It smells of lightning-struck stone, vinegar, and white flowers.
A clear green concentrate with a clean bitter scent of pine needles, salt, and cut citrus. A single drop turns cloudy near common toxins.
A slippery silver resin that refuses to cling to knots or rough surfaces. It smells of river reeds, soaproot, and cold wind.
A smoky gray serum with blue sparks that vanish when touched. It smells of ozone, wet earth, and bitter tea.

family_rider_sources.conditionDuration: until the end of the target's next turn
